name: manage_scene
description: Manage Unity scenes. Actions: 'status' shows the active scene and all loaded scenes; 'open' switches to a scene (saves current first by default); 'new' creates a new scene; 'save' saves all open scenes; 'close' unloads an additively loaded scene; 'load_additive' loads a scene alongside the current one. Always check 'status' first before operating on a scene to confirm which scene is active.

action.description: The scene operation to perform. Default: 'status'.

path.description: Asset path to the scene file (e.g. 'Assets/Scenes/Level1.unity'). Required for open, new, close, and load_additive.

setup.description: Scene setup for 'new' action. 'empty' creates a completely empty scene. 'default' adds a Camera and Directional Light (default if omitted).

save_current.description: Whether to save the current scene before switching. Default true. Applies to 'open' and 'new' actions.
